The code only facilitates interaction with a smart contract and does not perform any risky operations.  \n- **Verdict:** The risk score should likely be 0 or very close to it, as there's no evidence of vulnerability or malicious behavior.  \n\n---\n\n### Overall Summary:\n\n- **Malware Score:** All reports correctly identify that the code is not malicious. I agree with a malware score of **0** for all.  \n- **Obfuscated Score:** The code is clear, auto-generated boilerplate with no obfuscation.
